name: Primary Care Visit Codes
description: CPT codes for primary care office visits and preventive medicine evaluations. Used in adults access to preventive/ambulatory health services (AAP) and other measures requiring evidence of a primary care encounter.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
